OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Hyde Investment LP is present. Represented by Roman Knop.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mercy Mena is present.
Attorney Lindsay M. Andrews representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
